events.title: Trivia Mafia
events.description:
Trivia Mafia is a bar and brewery trivia operation based in Minneapolis, Minnesota. We produce the highest-quality trivia nights in bars, taprooms, distilleries, and private events every night of the week throughout the Midwest (and beyond!). We’ve also been known to run theme trivia nights, spelling bees, and other fine pub entertainments.

Get the team back together and join us every Wednesday night.
Tables will be first come first served in the Taproom and Beer Garden.

events.title: Sweet Lou's Meats
events.description: View menu here!

events.title: Cribbage Tournament
events.description:
Join us at our Taproom every Thursday for our weekly cribbage tournament!
Up to 32 individuals may sign up to play, so get here early and sign up quickly.
All skill levels are welcome to join.
The winner of the tournament receives a gift card and the title of Cribbage Champion…at least for a week.

events.title: Cuchillo
events.description: View menu HERE!

events.title: World Watch Party
events.description:
Join the Worlds biggest watch party at Utepils Brewing!

We’re showing EVERY match we can during business hours, and no matter your country, club, colors, or chants… there’s a seat for you here. Bring your flags. Bring your friends. Bring your game day energy. From opening whistle to final stoppage time, we’re your home for the Beautiful Game all tournament long.

Because the Beautiful Game deserves a Beautiful Beer. 🍻

Whether you’re cheering for a global powerhouse, the under dog, or just here for the vibes, Utepils is the place to watch.

A watch party for the World.

events.title: Beer Garden Grooves
events.description:
Saturdays just hit different in the Beer Garden ☀️🍻

All summer long, we’re bringing a rotating lineup of live music to Utepils—everything from laid-back acoustic sets to high-energy bands that keep the good times rolling. No matter your vibe, there’s a sound (and a seat) waiting for you.

6:00PM - 8:00PM

Special Saturdays in the Summer.

Cold beer, fresh air, and great music… that’s how Saturdays are meant to be.

*Will be moved to Taproom if weather.

events.title: Yoga Flow with Annie Hayes
events.description:
A relaxed, all-levels yoga class held inside Utepils Brewing—flow, stretch, and unwind, then stick around to enjoy a fresh craft beer with the community. 🧘‍♀️🍺

Join us for The Original Yoga + Beer, a laid-back flow designed to wake up your body, lighten your mood, and ease you into the day.

✨ What’s Included
• 50-min all-levels yoga class 🧘‍♀️
• A pint (or other beverage) 🍺
• A side of humor + community 💛

💵 Cost: $15
(Eventbrite, Venmo, or cash at the door - no refunds, but tickets roll over for a future class!)

☀️ What to Expect
We’ll start slow, warm up the body, move through a gentle flow, and finish with energy to seize the day.

 

Buy Tickets Here!

events.title: Messy Jesse's
events.description: View menu here!

events.title: International Café
events.description:
Join Utepils Brewing for a language café/intercambio style casual multilingual hangout from 2pm - 5pm.

 

Show up to the Taproom and scan the QR code to check out the INT'L CAFE website and grab FREE tickets to the event, if you haven't already.

Next,

  1. Put on your language stickers 🔖
  2. Grab a beverage at the bar 🍺
  3. Pick a language table 🗣️
  4. Introduce yourself 👋
  5. Have a good time! 🎉

This event is FREE to attend, but donations are always welcome 😁

events.title: Analog Game Night
events.description:
Mondays just got more FUN!

Calling all hobbyists, gamers, and casual players alike! Join us every Monday night for Analog Game Night — a weekly gathering of game enthusiasts ready to roll dice, shuffle decks, and sip great brews.

Bring your favorite game and find a spot in our cozy taproom! Whether you’re into MTG Commander, Catan, Chess, Monopoly, Uno, or Cards Against Humanity, all games (and players) are welcome.

Want to dive deeper into tabletop or RPG games like D&D? Let us know — if there’s interest, we’ll add more tables for that too!

So grab your crew (or come solo and make new friends), enjoy some fresh Utepils beer, and get your game on.

Free to play. Fun guaranteed.

In the meantime, it's Sunday and we would love to share a few brews with you!

events.title: Dame Errant Clay Workshop - Berry Bowl Carve
events.description:
Join Dame Errant for this workshop in the Beer Garden at Utepils Brewing as part of their summer brewery series!

This fun-filled workshop will let your imagination take flight as you create your very own garden gnome. Gnomes and garden helpers have long played a role in European culture as guardians of treasure and to ward off evil.

Dame Errant's skilled instructors will guide you through the step-by-step process using the time-honored technique of pinch pots.

Note: Pinch Pots can be tricky with long nails.

$65 - Tickets HERE.

You’ll be thankful to have your little gnome friend watch over and protect your garden through the season and be there to greet you when you come to visit.

No experience is needed!
🏺 Pick up pieces at Dame Errant Clay once they are fired.

events.title: Young Man MSP
events.description: View menu HERE!

events.title: FREE Meat & Cheese Raffle
events.description:
It’s Tuesday… and you know what that means!
TONIGHT from 6:00PM – 8:00PM, our FREE Meat & Cheese Raffle is back!
Here’s how it works:
Grab a beer → get a raffle ticket
Every 10 minutes, we draw winners
Meat from Kramarczuk’s + cheese from Redhead Creamery up for grabs!
(Must be present to win)
Want extra chances to win?
Bring a non-perishable food item or donate to support our friends at NorthPoint Health & Wellness Center!
Come for the beer, stay for the prizes, and leave with some delicious winnings.
We can’t wait to hang out with y’all tonight… Meat you there?

events.title: MNUFC Watch Party
events.description:
⚽️ Calling all Loons fans! ⚽️

Our Taproom will be showing MNUFC matches all season long — home AND away games!*

*Game showings subject to change.

Grab your crew, throw on your best kit, and join us as we cheer on the Loons together. Whether it’s a nail-biter in stoppage time or a goal that hits the back of the net like a perfectly poured pint, there’s no better place to watch the match than surrounded by fellow fans and great beer. 🍻

We’ll have the games on, the pints flowing, and the chants ready. All you have to do is show up ready to root for the Loons.

events.title: Sociable Circuit
events.description:
We are back with Socable Circuit!
FREE SHOW!
Every LAST Monday of the month | 5:00PM - 8:00PM | 1 hour networking and a 30-45 minute presentations to follow!
 These are PHONES FREE social experiments that are shy and introvert inclusive. Come learn and engage with us as people share their passions with the audience. Ask questions and provide feedback to help them improve their communication skills on the spot.
We ALL need this. Let’s do something about it.
This is a live social experiment where we challenge experts to explain their knowledge as simply as possible using audience interaction.
Come get social with us.
